title: Down And Out Down Under
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is swept from his office to the wild wonders of Australia — surfing, sacred red rocks, and new friends! 🇦🇺

q.en: Who makes a surprising phone call to Geronimo at the beginning of the story?
q.zh: 在故事开头，谁给杰罗尼摩打来了一通令人意外的电话？

options.en: His nephew Benjamin according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他的侄子本杰明（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Petunia Pretty Paws, a famous TV reporter
options.zh: 著名的电视记者佩图尼娅·漂亮爪

explain.en: Petunia Pretty Paws, a TV reporter Geronimo has a crush on, calls him to invite him on an adventure.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩暗恋的电视记者佩图尼娅·漂亮爪给他打电话，邀请他一起去冒险。

q.en: What is the name of Petunia's twin brother who parachutes into Geronimo's office?
q.zh: 降落伞空降到杰罗尼摩办公室的、佩图尼娅的双胞胎兄弟叫什么名字？

options.en: Wolfgang 'Wolfie' Wild Paws, a TV producer
options.zh: 电视制作人沃尔夫冈“沃菲”·野爪

options.en: Benjamin Stilton, the nephew according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 侄子本杰明·斯蒂顿（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Wolfgang 'Wolfie' Wild Paws is Petunia's twin brother and a TV producer who dedicates his life to protecting nature.
explain.zh: 沃尔夫冈“沃菲”·野爪是佩图尼娅的双胞胎兄弟，也是一位致力保护自然的电视制作人。

q.en: Where do Petunia and Wolfie invite Geronimo to travel to report on wildlife?
q.zh: 佩图尼娅和沃菲邀请杰罗尼摩去哪里报道野生动物保护？

options.en: Japan, to learn about samurai according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 日本，了解武士（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Australia, to help save its wildlife
options.zh: 澳大利亚，帮忙保护当地野生动物

explain.en: They invite Geronimo to Australia to report on their efforts to save Australian wildlife and protect the land.
explain.zh: 他们邀请杰罗尼摩去澳大利亚，报道他们保护当地野生动物和土地的努力。

q.en: Why is Australia sometimes called the 'Land Down Under'?
q.zh: 澳大利亚为什么有时被称为“下方的陆地”（Land Down Under）？

options.en: It lies entirely in the Southern Hemisphere
It is covered in snow all year
It is the smallest country in the world according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它是世界上最小的国家（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: It has no people living there

explain.en: Australia lies entirely in the Southern Hemisphere, so people call it the 'Land Down Under'.
explain.zh: 澳大利亚完全位于南半球，因此人们称它为“下方的陆地”。

q.en: In Sydney, what famous building with a sail-shaped roof does Geronimo see?
q.zh: 在悉尼，杰罗尼摩看到了哪座屋顶形状像船帆的著名建筑？

options.zh: 一座巨大的巧克力工厂

explain.en: In Sydney Geronimo sees the Opera House, a spectacular building with a roof shaped like the sails of a boat.
explain.zh: 在悉尼，杰罗尼摩看到了歌剧院，那是一座屋顶像船帆一样奇妙的建筑。

q.en: At Bondi Beach, what sport does Wolfie make Geronimo try for the first time?
q.zh: 在邦迪海滩，沃菲逼杰罗尼摩第一次尝试什么运动？

explain.en: Wolfie makes Geronimo paddle out and ride a huge wave at Bondi Beach, and he becomes a 'surfing sensation'.
explain.zh: 沃菲让杰罗尼摩划水出去、乘着巨浪冲浪，结果他成了“冲浪明星”。

q.en: At Shark Bay, what animal actually approaches Geronimo instead of a shark?
q.zh: 在鲨鱼湾，靠近杰罗尼摩的其实是什么动物，而不是鲨鱼？

explain.en: Geronimo shouts 'SHARK!' but it turns out to be a friendly dolphin that lets the mice ride on its back.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩大喊“鲨鱼！”，结果那是一只用背驮着老鼠们游泳的友善海豚。

q.en: At Uluru (Ayers Rock), what do Geronimo and his friends refuse to do out of respect for the Anangu people?
q.zh: 在乌卢鲁（艾尔斯岩），杰罗尼摩和朋友们出于对阿南古人（Anangu）的尊重，拒绝做什么？

options.en: Take a boat tour around it
Climb to the top of the rock
Take photographs of the rock according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 给岩石拍照（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The Anangu consider Uluru sacred, so Geronimo, Petunia and Wolfie refuse to climb it and respect their wishes.
explain.zh: 阿南古人把乌卢鲁视为圣地，所以杰罗尼摩、佩图尼娅和沃菲拒绝攀爬，尊重他们的意愿。

q.en: In the Australian bush, which of these dangerous animals does Geronimo encounter?
q.zh: 在澳大利亚丛林里，杰罗尼摩遇到了以下哪种危险的动物？

options.en: A taipan, one of the world's most poisonous snakes
options.zh: 太攀蛇，世界上最毒的蛇之一

options.en: A polar bear according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 北极熊（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: In the bush Geronimo meets an echidna, a kangaroo, an emu, and a taipan — one of the world's most poisonous snakes.
explain.zh: 在丛林里，杰罗尼摩遇到了针鼹、袋鼠、鸸鹋，还有太攀蛇——世界上最毒的蛇之一。

q.en: What gift does the Aboriginal chief Wangara give Geronimo?
q.zh: 原住民首领万加拉（Wangara）送给了杰罗尼摩什么礼物？

options.zh: 用桉树枝做的迪吉里杜管

options.en: A baby kangaroo according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一只小袋鼠（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Chief Wangara gives Geronimo a didgeridoo that his own grandfather had given him — a gift from the heart. Geronimo gives Wangara his grandfather's fountain pen in return.
explain.zh: 万加拉首领把自己祖父传给他的迪吉里杜管送给杰罗尼摩——一份发自内心的礼物。杰罗尼摩则回赠了祖父给他的钢笔。
